note: Defines v1 baseline corpus acceptance criteria and requires clean reingestion only after manifest and smoke gate pass.
Authoritative 100-row v1 source manifest with quality tier, conversion strategy, fallback policy, validation queries, and minimum quality gate.
12-source smoke gate passed: 12 downloaded, 12 prepare passed, 0 hard failures, 0 reject-pattern rows.
Batch execution must use source validation, smoke batch, batch size <=20, heavy format limit <=5, append-only reports, and failure queue.
Full reingestion will use .venv/Scripts/pkcs.exe prepare-ingest and ingest, which call the same application service as MCP ingest.
